parameters.query:
WITH
  -- date arrives as brasilia time and is converted to utc
initial_date AS (VALUES('{{ $json.initialDate }}'::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'))
,final_date AS (VALUES ('{{ $json.finalDate }}'::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'))


,sdr_inboxes AS(
    SELECT inboxes.id FROM inboxes WHERE inboxes.name LIKE '%SDR%' OR inboxes.name LIKE '%BDR%'
)

,sales_inboxes AS(
    SELECT inboxes.id FROM inboxes
        WHERE inboxes.name NOT LIKE '%SDR%'
            AND inboxes.name NOT LIKE '%BDR%'
            AND inboxes.name NOT like '%Test%'
)

,test_contact_id AS(
VALUES (42065) ,(42066) ,(42067) ,(42068) ,(42048) ,(43637)
      ,(43904) ,(44756) ,(44757) ,(49052) ,(42787)
)

,active_conversations AS (
SELECT
    DISTINCT conversation_id
FROM messages
WHERE (messages.created_at::timestamptz)
      BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
)

,messages_all_active_conversations AS (
SELECT
    messages.*
    , conversations.contact_id
    , conversations.cached_label_list

FROM conversations
    JOIN active_conversations a
        ON a.conversation_id = conversations.id
    JOIN messages
        ON conversations.id = messages.conversation_id
WHERE conversations.contact_id NOT IN (TABLE test_contact_id)
)

, messages_info AS(
SELECT
    messages.id
    , messages.content
    , messages.account_id
    , messages.inbox_id
    , messages.conversation_id
    , messages.message_type
    , (messages.created_at::timestamptz) AS created_at
    , messages.updated_at
    , messages.private
    , messages.status
    , messages.content_type
    , messages.sender_id
    , messages.cached_label_list

    , CASE WHEN messages.private AND messages.content LIKE '🧾 RESUMO DA CONVERSA%'
              THEN  'Contact'
         ELSE messages.sender_type
    END AS sender_type

    
    , LAST_VALUE(CASE WHEN messages.private AND messages.content LIKE '🧾 RESUMO DA CONVERSA%'
              THEN  'Contact'
         ELSE messages.sender_type END) 
          OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id 
               ORDER BY 
                   CASE WHEN sender_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END NULLS FIRST 
	           , messages.created_at ASC
               ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)
    AS previous_sender_type

FROM messages_all_active_conversations AS messages
)

, messages_info_with_is_interaction_turn AS (
SELECT
    messages.*
    , (CASE WHEN
                sender_type IS NOT NULL 
                AND (previous_sender_type != sender_type OR previous_sender_type IS NULL)
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
      END)::int
    AS is_interaction_turn
    FROM messages_info AS messages
)

,messages_info_with_interaction_turn AS (
SELECT

    messages.*
    , (SUM(is_interaction_turn)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id
	          ORDER BY messages.created_at ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING))::int
    AS interaction_turn


FROM messages_info_with_is_interaction_turn AS messages
)

, interaction_groups AS (
SELECT
    *
    , MIN(created_at) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn)
    AS interaction_turn_begin_time

    , MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn)
    AS interaction_turn_end_time

    , ((interaction_turn) / 2)::int
    AS interactions

    , FIRST_VALUE(id)
          OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn
                    ORDER BY CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0
		                      AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
				  THEN created_at
		             END NULLS LAST
			     , created_at
	            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING)
    AS interaction_first_message_id

    , FIRST_VALUE(CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0
                           AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
			   AND created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
		       THEN id
		  END)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id
                  ORDER BY CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0
		                    AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
				    AND created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
		                THEN created_at
			   END NULLS LAST
			   , created_at
                  ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING)
    AS id_first_interaction_turn_this_period
    , MIN(interaction_turn)
          FILTER (WHERE interaction_turn > 0
                      AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
                      AND created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date))
          OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS first_interaction_turn_this_period
FROM messages_info_with_interaction_turn
)

, interaction_groups_with_interaction_turn_end_time AS (
SELECT
    *
    , EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (interaction_turn_end_time - interaction_turn_begin_time))
    AS interaction_turn_interval_seconds
    , LAG(interaction_turn_end_time)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id ORDER BY created_at ASC)
    AS lag_interaction_turn_end_time

FROM interaction_groups
)

, interaction_groups_with_stats AS (
SELECT
    *
    , (cached_label_list IS NOT NULL AND cached_label_list LIKE '%sem_interesse%')
    AS without_interest
    , CASE
        WHEN is_interaction_turn = 1
            THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (interaction_turn_begin_time
                                     - lag_interaction_turn_end_time))
    END AS response_time_seconds
    , MAX(interaction_turn)
        FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL)
        OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS total_interaction_turns

    , EXTRACT(HOUR FROM interaction_turn_end_time::timestamp)::int
    AS hour_of_day
    , EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM interaction_turn_end_time::timestamp)::int
    AS day_of_week
FROM interaction_groups_with_interaction_turn_end_time
)

,conversations_info AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , (conversations.created_at::timestamptz) AS conversation_created_at
    , conversations.inbox_id
    , total_interaction_turns
    , count(1) FILTER (WHERE without_interest) > 0 as without_interest

    , MAX(interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn)
        - COALESCE((MAX(interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn) FILTER(
            WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at < (TABLE initial_date)
        )), 0
    ) AS interaction_turns_this_period
    , MAX(interaction_groups_with_stats.interactions) AS total_interactions
    , MAX(interaction_groups_with_stats.interactions)
        - COALESCE((MAX(interaction_groups_with_stats.interactions) FILTER(
            WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at < (TABLE initial_date)
        )), 0)
    AS interactions_this_period
    , COUNT(interaction_groups_with_stats.id) AS total_messages_conversation
    , COUNT(interaction_groups_with_stats.id) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
    ) AS messages_this_period
    , COUNT(interaction_groups_with_stats.id) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND interaction_groups_with_stats.sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS agent_messages_this_period

    , AVG(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
    , COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period

    , AVG(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
                        AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60)
    ) AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
    , COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
                        AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60)
    ) AS agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period

    , AVG(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'Contact'
    ) AS lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
    , COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'Contact'
    ) AS lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period

    , SUM(response_time_seconds) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
	    AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn
                OR  first_interaction_turn_this_period + 2 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn)
    ) AS agent_first_response_time_seconds
    , COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
	    AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
            AND (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn
                OR  first_interaction_turn_this_period + 2 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn)
    ) AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds
    , SUM(response_time_seconds) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
	    AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
            AND (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn
                OR  first_interaction_turn_this_period + 2 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn)
	   AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60)
    ) AS agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm
    , COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
	    AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
            AND (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn
                OR  first_interaction_turn_this_period + 2 = interaction_groups_with_stats.interaction_turn)
	   AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60)
    ) AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm
    , MIN(first_interaction_turn_this_period) OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS first_interaction_turn_this_period
    , COUNT(is_interaction_turn) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND sender_type = 'Contact'
            AND ((first_interaction_turn_this_period = total_interaction_turns
                    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_turn)
                 OR (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = total_interaction_turns
                     AND first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_turn)
                )
            AND not without_interest
    ) AS agent_count_missed_first_response
    , COUNT(is_interaction_turn) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND sender_type = 'Contact'
            AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND ((first_interaction_turn_this_period = total_interaction_turns
                    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_turn)
                 OR (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = total_interaction_turns
                     AND first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_turn)
                )
            AND conversations.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND not without_interest
    ) AS agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation
    , COUNT(is_interaction_turn) FILTER(
        WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date)
            AND (TABLE final_date)
            AND (is_interaction_turn = 1 OR interaction_groups_with_stats.id = id_first_interaction_turn_this_period)
            AND sender_type = 'User'
            AND ((first_interaction_turn_this_period = total_interaction_turns
                    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_turn)
                 OR (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = total_interaction_turns
                     AND first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_turn)
                )
    ) AS lead_count_missed_first_response
    , bool_or(conversations.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
                OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
        AND bool_or(conversations.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes) 
		                                   AND conversations.created_at 
                                                   BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
				    )
                    OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS is_qualified_lead
    , MIN(conversations.created_at)
        FILTER (WHERE conversations.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS sdr_conversation_created
    , MIN(conversations.created_at)
        FILTER (WHERE conversations.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS sales_conversation_created
    , conversations.contact_id
    , display_id
    , MIN(CASE WHEN content ILIKE '%https://reservas.demo-events.com.br/%' THEN content END)
    AS  sent_link

    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(interaction_groups_with_stats))
    --     FILTER(WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at < (table initial_date))
    -- AS debug,
    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(interaction_groups_with_stats))
    --     FILTER(WHERE interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at >= (table initial_date))
    -- AS debug2,

    , jsonb_agg(
        jsonb_build_object(
            'id', interaction_groups_with_stats.id,
            'created_at', interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at,
            'inbox_id', conversations.inbox_id,
            'interaction_turn', interaction_turn,
            'interactions', interactions,
            'interaction_turn_interval_seconds', interaction_turn_interval_seconds,
            'response_time_seconds', response_time_seconds,
            'sender_type', sender_type,
            'content', content,
            'id_first_interaction_turn_this_period', id_first_interaction_turn_this_period,
            'first_interaction_turn_this_period', first_interaction_turn_this_period,
			'display_id', display_id
        ) ORDER BY interaction_groups_with_stats.created_at
  ) AS conversation_messages

FROM interaction_groups_with_stats
  LEFT JOIN conversations ON conversations.id = conversation_id
GROUP BY conversation_id, conversations.created_at, conversations.inbox_id,
         conversations.contact_id, first_interaction_turn_this_period,
         total_interaction_turns, display_id
)

, conversations_info2 AS (
SELECT
  conversation_id
  , conversation_created_at
  , inbox_id
  , total_interaction_turns
  , interaction_turns_this_period
  , total_interactions
  , interactions_this_period
  , total_messages_conversation
  , messages_this_period
  , agent_messages_this_period
  , agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
  , agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period
  , agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
  , agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period
  , lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
  , lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
  , agent_first_response_time_seconds
  , agent_count_first_response_time_seconds
  , agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm
  , agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm
  , first_interaction_turn_this_period
  , agent_count_missed_first_response
  , lead_count_missed_first_response
  , agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation
  , is_qualified_lead
  , contact_id
  , without_interest
  , display_id
  , sent_link

  , (SELECT message_json->>'sender_type'
        FROM jsonb_array_elements(conversations_info.conversation_messages) AS message_json
        WHERE message_json->>'sender_type' IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY message_json->>'created_at' ASC
        LIMIT 1)
    AS first_sender
  , (SELECT message_json->>'sender_type'
        FROM jsonb_array_elements(conversations_info.conversation_messages) AS message_json
        WHERE message_json->>'sender_type' IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY message_json->>'created_at' DESC
        LIMIT 1)
    AS last_sender
  , sdr_conversation_created
  , sales_conversation_created
  , EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (sales_conversation_created - sdr_conversation_created))
  AS qualifying_time_seconds

  , conversation_messages

FROM conversations_info
)

, conversations_agg AS (
SELECT
        SUM (agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
        AS agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
        , SUM (lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
        AS total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period

	-- sdr
        , SUM (agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
        , SUM (lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
        , SUM (agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period

	-- sales
	, SUM (agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
	, SUM (lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
	, SUM (agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period
FROM conversations_info2
)

, conversation_avg AS (
SELECT
        SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            / (SELECT agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

        , SUM(lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            / (SELECT total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

	, AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds)
        AS agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period

	, AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
        AS agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

	, AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
        AS agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

        --sdr
        , (SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sdr_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

        , (SUM(lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sdr_total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sdr_lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

        , (SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
            * agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sdr_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

        , AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
	, AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period
        , AVG(interactions_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
        AS sdr_avg_interactions_this_period
        , AVG(interactions_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes) AND is_qualified_lead)
        AS sdr_avg_interactions_this_period_by_qualified_lead

	-- sales
	, (SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sales_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

	, (SUM(lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
            * lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sales_total_lead_count_interaction_responses_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sales_lead_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

        , (SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
            * agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
            FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)))
            / (SELECT sales_agent_total_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period
                FROM conversations_agg)
        AS sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

        , AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period
	, AVG(agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period_norm
        , AVG(interactions_this_period)
                FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        AS sales_avg_interactions_this_period
	, COUNT(sent_link) FILTER (WHERE sent_link IS NOT NULL)
	AS total_sent_link

FROM conversations_info2
)

,inboxes_info AS(
SELECT
    inbox_id
    , inboxes.name AS inbox_name
    
    , COUNT(conversation_id)
        FILTER (WHERE first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL)
    AS total_active_conversations
    , COUNT(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
              BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date))
    AS new_conversations
    , COUNT(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE
          conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
              BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
          AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL)
    AS not_empty_new_conversations
    , COUNT(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE
          conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
              BETWEEN (TABLE initial_date) AND (TABLE final_date)
          AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NULL)
    AS empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(total_interaction_turns) AS total_interaction_turns

    , sum(total_interactions) AS total_interactions
    , SUM(interaction_turns_this_period) AS interaction_turns_this_period
    , SUM(interactions_this_period) AS interactions_this_period
    , SUM(messages_this_period) AS messages_this_period
    , SUM(agent_messages_this_period) AS agent_messages_this_period
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.last_sender = 'User'
              AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL)
    AS count_last_message_was_agent
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.last_sender = 'Contact'
                AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL)
    AS count_last_message_was_lead
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 1)
    AS count_at_least_one_full_interaction
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period > 1)
    AS count_more_than_one_full_interaction
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 3)
    AS count_three_or_more_full_interaction
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 5)
    AS count_five_or_more_full_interaction
    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 10)
    AS count_ten_or_more_full_interaction

    , COUNT(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
        FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.last_sender = 'Contact'
                    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL
                    AND NOT conversations_info2.without_interest)
    AS agent_count_missed_response

    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
    AS agent_count_missed_first_response

    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
        FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_agent_count_missed_first_response

    , SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response)
    AS lead_count_missed_first_response

    , SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period *
        agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
    AS sum_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period

    , SUM(agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period *
        agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
    AS sum_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
    
    , SUM(agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
    AS agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period

    , SUM(agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
    AS agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period
    
    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation)
    AS agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation

    , SUM(agent_first_response_time_seconds)
    AS sum_agent_first_response_time_seconds

    , SUM(agent_count_first_response_time_seconds)
    AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds

    , SUM(agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
    AS sum_agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm

    , SUM(agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
    AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm

    , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
        THEN count(DISTINCT contact_id) FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
        ELSE 0
    END AS count_qualified_leads

    , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
        THEN AVG(interactions_this_period)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS sdr_avg_interactions

    , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)
        THEN AVG(interactions_this_period)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS sales_avg_interactions

    , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
        THEN AVG(interactions_this_period) FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead

    , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
        THEN AVG(qualifying_time_seconds) FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS avg_qualifying_time_seconds

    , COUNT(sent_link) FILTER (WHERE sent_link IS NOT NULL)
    AS total_sent_links

    -- ,jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(conversations_info2))
    --    FILTER(WHERE lead_count_missed_first_response > 0)
    --  as debug

FROM conversations_info2 JOIN inboxes ON inboxes.id = conversations_info2.inbox_id
GROUP BY inbox_id, inboxes.name
)

,inboxes_info2 AS(
SELECT
    *
    , (sum_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
    / agent_count_interaction_responses_this_period)
    AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period
    , (sum_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
    / agent_count_interaction_responses_norm_this_period)
    AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period
    , (sum_agent_first_response_time_seconds
    / agent_count_first_response_time_seconds)
    AS agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds
    , (sum_agent_first_response_time_seconds_norm
    / agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm)
    AS agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm
    
FROM inboxes_info
)


,aggregates AS (
SELECT
    SUM(inboxes_info2.total_active_conversations) AS total_active_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.total_active_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_active_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.total_active_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_active_conversations

    , SUM(inboxes_info2.new_conversations)
    AS new_conversation
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_new_conversation
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_new_conversation
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.empty_new_conversations)
    AS empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.empty_new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.empty_new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.not_empty_new_conversations)
    AS not_empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.not_empty_new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_not_empty_new_conversations
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.not_empty_new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_not_empty_new_conversations

    , SUM(total_interactions)
    AS total_interactions

    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_agent)
    AS count_last_message_was_agent
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_agent)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_last_message_was_agent

    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_lead)
    AS count_last_message_was_lead
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_lead)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_last_message_was_lead
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_lead)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_count_last_message_was_lead
    , SUM(inboxes_info2.count_last_message_was_agent)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_count_last_message_was_agent

    -- , jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inboxes_info2))
    --     filter(WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_name LIKE '%SDR%')
    -- AS debug

    , SUM(interaction_turns_this_period)
    AS interaction_turns_this_period
    , SUM(interaction_turns_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_interaction_turns_this_period

    , SUM(interactions_this_period)
    AS interactions_this_period
    , SUM(interactions_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_interactions_this_period

    , SUM(interaction_turns_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_interaction_turns_this_period

    , SUM(interactions_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_interactions_this_period

    , SUM(messages_this_period)
    AS messages_this_period
    , SUM(messages_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_messages_this_period
    , SUM(agent_messages_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_agent_messages_this_period

    , (SELECT agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS agent_avg_response_time_seconds

    , (SELECT sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds

    , (SELECT agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS agent_avg_first_response_time

    , (SELECT sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time

    , (SELECT sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_agent_avg_first_response_time_norm

    , (SELECT sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

    , (SELECT sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

    , (SELECT sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds

    , (SELECT sales_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sales_agent_avg_first_response_time

    , (SELECT sales_agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_this_period_norm FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sales_agent_avg_first_response_time_norm

    , (SELECT sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sales_agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period

    , SUM(count_at_least_one_full_interaction)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_at_least_one_full_interaction

    , SUM(count_more_than_one_full_interaction)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_more_than_one_full_interaction

    , SUM(count_three_or_more_full_interaction)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_three_or_more_full_interaction

    , SUM(count_five_or_more_full_interaction)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_five_or_more_full_interaction

    , SUM(count_ten_or_more_full_interaction)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_count_ten_or_more_full_interaction

    , SUM(agent_count_missed_response)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_agent_count_missed_response

    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
    AS agent_count_missed_first_response
    , SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response)
    AS lead_count_missed_first_response

    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_agent_count_missed_first_response
    , SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_lead_count_missed_first_response
    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation
    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_agent_count_missed_first_response
    , SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_lead_count_missed_first_response
    , SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_agent_count_missed_first_response_on_new_conversation
    , SUM(count_qualified_leads) AS count_qualified_leads


    , SUM(avg_qualifying_time_seconds * count_qualified_leads)
        / SUM(count_qualified_leads)
    AS avg_qualifying_time_seconds

    , (SELECT sdr_avg_interactions_this_period
        FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_avg_interactions
    , (SELECT sdr_avg_interactions_this_period_by_qualified_lead
         FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead

    , (SELECT sales_avg_interactions_this_period
        FROM conversation_avg)
    AS sales_avg_interactions

    , SUM(total_sent_links) FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_sent_links

    , SUM(total_sent_links) FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_sent_links

    , jsonb_agg(
        jsonb_build_object(
        'inbox_id', inbox_id,
        'inbox_name', inbox_name,
        'not_empty_new_conversations', not_empty_new_conversations,
        'total_interactions', total_interactions,
        'messages_this_period', messages_this_period,
        'count_qualified_leads', count_qualified_leads,
        'lead_count_missed_first_response', lead_count_missed_first_response,
        'interaction_turns_this_period', interaction_turns_this_period,
        'interactions_this_period', interactions_this_period,
        'total_active_conversations', total_active_conversations,
        'engaged_leads', (total_active_conversations - lead_count_missed_first_response),
        'count_last_message_was_agent', count_last_message_was_agent,
        'sdr_avg_interactions', sdr_avg_interactions,
        'avg_qualifying_time_seconds', avg_qualifying_time_seconds,
        'sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead', sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead,
        'agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period', agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period,
		'total_sent_links', total_sent_links
        ) ORDER BY inbox_id
    ) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_inboxes_info

    , jsonb_agg(
        jsonb_build_object(
        'inbox_id', inbox_id,
        'inbox_name', inbox_name,
        'not_empty_new_conversations', not_empty_new_conversations,
        'total_interactions', total_interactions,
        'messages_this_period', messages_this_period,
        'lead_count_missed_first_response', lead_count_missed_first_response,
        'agent_count_missed_first_response', agent_count_missed_first_response,
        'interaction_turns_this_period', interaction_turns_this_period,
        'interactions_this_period', interactions_this_period,
        'total_active_conversations', total_active_conversations,
        'engaged_leads', (total_active_conversations - lead_count_missed_first_response),
        'count_last_message_was_agent', count_last_message_was_agent,
        'count_last_message_was_lead', count_last_message_was_lead,
        'sales_avg_interactions', sales_avg_interactions,
        'agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period', agent_avg_response_time_seconds_this_period,
	'agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period', agent_avg_response_time_seconds_norm_this_period,
        'agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds', agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds,
	'agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm', agent_avg_first_response_time_seconds_norm,
        'total_sent_links', total_sent_links
        ) ORDER BY inbox_id
    ) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info2.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
    AS sales_inboxes_info

FROM inboxes_info2
)

, this_period_interactions AS (
SELECT
    *
    , ((interaction_turn + 1 - first_interaction_turn_this_period) / 2)::int
    AS interaction_this_period
FROM interaction_groups_with_stats
WHERE interaction_turn > first_interaction_turn_this_period
)

, sdr_time_interactions AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    interaction_this_period,
    hour_of_day
FROM this_period_interactions
WHERE
  inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period, hour_of_day
)

,sdr_time_interactions2 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , interaction_this_period
    , MAX(hour_of_day) AS hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period
)

,sdr_time_interactions3 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , hour_of_day
    , COUNT(hour_of_day) AS count_interactions_hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions2
GROUP BY conversation_id, hour_of_day
)

,sdr_time_interactions4 AS(
SELECT
    hour_of_day
    , SUM(count_interactions_hour_of_day) AS count_interactions_hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions3
GROUP BY hour_of_day
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , interaction_this_period
    , day_of_week
FROM this_period_interactions
WHERE
  inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period, day_of_week
)

, sdr_weekday_interactions2 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , interaction_this_period
    , MAX(day_of_week) AS day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions3 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id
    , day_of_week
    , COUNT(day_of_week) AS count_interactions_day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions2
GROUP BY conversation_id, day_of_week
)

, sdr_weekday_interactions4 AS(
SELECT
    day_of_week
    , SUM(count_interactions_day_of_week) AS count_interactions_day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions3
GROUP BY day_of_week
)

, sdr_active_conversations AS(
SELECT
    DISTINCT conversation_id
FROM conversations_info2
WHERE
    inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL
)

, sdr_labels AS(
SELECT
    TRIM(label) AS label
    , COUNT(label) AS COUNT
FROM sdr_active_conversations a
    INNER JOIN conversations c ON a.conversation_id = c.id
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(c.cached_label_list, ',')) AS label
WHERE c.cached_label_list IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(label) != ''
    AND c.inbox_id IN (TABLE sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY TRIM(label)
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
)

, sales_active_conversations AS(
SELECT
    DISTINCT conversation_id
FROM conversations_info2
WHERE
    inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)
    AND first_interaction_turn_this_period IS NOT NULL
)

, sales_labels AS(
SELECT
    TRIM(label) AS label
    , COUNT(label) AS count
FROM sales_active_conversations a
    INNER JOIN conversations c ON a.conversation_id = c.id
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(c.cached_label_list, ',')) AS label
WHERE c.cached_label_list IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(label) != ''
    AND c.inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes)
GROUP BY TRIM(label)
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
)

,all_time_sdr_sent_links AS (
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) 
FROM messages
WHERE content like '%https://reservas.demo-events.com.br/%' AND sender_type = 'User'
    AND messages.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)
)

SELECT
    *
    , (sdr_active_conversations
       - sdr_lead_count_missed_first_response)
    AS sdr_engaged_leads
    , (sales_active_conversations
       - sales_lead_count_missed_first_response)
    AS sales_engaged_leads
    , (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sdr_time_interactions4))
      FROM sdr_time_interactions4)
    AS sdr_time_interactions
    , (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sdr_weekday_interactions4))
      FROM sdr_weekday_interactions4)
    AS sdr_weekday_interactions
    , (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sdr_labels))
      FROM sdr_labels)
    AS sdr_labels
    , (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sales_labels))
      FROM sales_labels)
    AS sales_labels
    , (table all_time_sdr_sent_links)
    AS all_time_sdr_sent_links
    
FROM aggregates
;

parameters.query:
WITH
  -- date arrives as brasilia time and is converted to utc
initial_date AS (VALUES('{{ $json.initialDate }}'::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'))
,final_date AS (VALUES ('{{ $json.finalDate }}'::timestamptz AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'))

,sdr_inboxes AS(
    SELECT inboxes.id FROM inboxes WHERE inboxes.name LIKE '%SDR%' OR inboxes.name LIKE '%BDR%'
)
			              --paulo --thiago --leo   --luiz   --luiz
,test_contact_id AS(VALUES(42068),(42065),(42048), (42067), (43637))

,active_conversations AS (
SELECT
    DISTINCT conversation_id
FROM messages
WHERE (messages.created_at::timestamptz)
      BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date)
)

,messages_all_active_conversations AS (
SELECT
    messages.*,
    conversations.contact_id

FROM conversations
    JOIN active_conversations a
	ON a.conversation_id = conversations.id
    JOIN messages
	ON conversations.id = messages.conversation_id
WHERE conversations.contact_id not in (table test_contact_id)
)

, messages_info AS(
SELECT
    messages.id,
    messages.content,
    messages.account_id,
    messages.inbox_id,
    messages.conversation_id,
    messages.message_type,
    messages.created_at,
    messages.updated_at,
    messages.private,
    messages.status,
    messages.content_type,
    messages.sender_id,

    CASE WHEN messages.private AND messages.content LIKE '🧾 RESUMO DA CONVERSA%'
    	      THEN  'Contact'
	 ELSE messages.sender_type
    END AS sender_type,

    COALESCE(
        LAG(
            CASE WHEN private AND content LIKE '🧾 RESUMO DA CONVERSA%'
                 THEN 'Contact'
                 ELSE sender_type
            END
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY conversation_id
            ORDER BY created_at
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
        ),
        'FIRST_MESSAGE'
    ) AS previous_sender

FROM messages_all_active_conversations as messages
)

, messages_info2 AS (
SELECT
    messages.*,
    (CASE
	WHEN previous_sender != sender_type
	THEN 1
	ELSE 0
    END)::int as is_interaction_turn
    -- ,(CASE
    --     WHEN previous_sender != sender_type
    --     THEN sender_type
    --     ELSE previous_sender
    -- END) as sender_type_turn
    FROM messages_info as messages
)

,messages_info3 AS (
SELECT

    messages.id,
    messages.conversation_id,
    (messages.created_at::timestamptz) AS created_at,
    messages.sender_type,
    messages.inbox_id,
    is_interaction_turn,

    (SUM(is_interaction_turn) OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id ORDER BY messages.created_at ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING))::int
    AS interaction_turn,

    messages.content

FROM messages_info2 as messages
)

,interaction_groups AS (
SELECT
    *,
    MIN(created_at) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL) OVER (
        PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn
    ) as interaction_begin_time,

    MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL) OVER (
        PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn
    ) as interaction_end_time,

    ((interaction_turn) / 2)::int AS interactions,

    FIRST_VALUE(id) OVER (
        PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn
        ORDER BY CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0 AND sender_type IS NOT NULL THEN created_at END NULLS LAST
    ) AS interaction_first_message_id,

    FIRST_VALUE(CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0 AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
                      AND created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date)
                 THEN id END) OVER (
        PARTITION BY conversation_id
        ORDER BY created_at
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    ) AS id_first_interaction_turn_this_period,
    MIN(interaction_turn) FILTER (
    	WHERE interaction_turn > 0
        AND sender_type IS NOT NULL
        AND created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date)
	) OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS first_interaction_turn_this_period

FROM messages_info3
)

,interaction_groups2 AS (
SELECT
    *,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (interaction_end_time - interaction_begin_time)) as interaction_interval_seconds,
    LAG(interaction_end_time) OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id ORDER BY created_at asc) lag_interaction_end_time

FROM interaction_groups
)

,interaction_groups3 AS (
SELECT
    id,
    conversation_id,
    created_at,
    inbox_id,
    sender_type,
    interaction_turn,
    interactions,
    interaction_begin_time,
    interaction_end_time,
    interaction_interval_seconds,
    id_first_interaction_turn_this_period,
    first_interaction_turn_this_period,

    CASE
	WHEN is_interaction_turn = 1
	    THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (interaction_begin_time - lag_interaction_end_time))
    END as response_time_seconds,
    MAX(interaction_turn)
	FILTER (WHERE sender_type is not null)
	OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS total_interaction_turns,

    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM interaction_end_time::timestamp)::int AS hour_of_day,
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM interaction_end_time::timestamp)::int AS day_of_week,
    interaction_end_time,
    content
FROM interaction_groups2
)

,conversations_info AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    (conversations.created_at::timestamptz) AS conversation_created_at,
    conversations.inbox_id,
    total_interaction_turns,

    MAX(interaction_groups3.interaction_turn)
	- COALESCE((MAX(interaction_groups3.interaction_turn) FILTER(
	    WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at < (table initial_date)
	)), 0
    ) AS interaction_turns_this_period,
    MAX(interaction_groups3.interactions) AS total_interactions,
    MAX(interaction_groups3.interactions)
	- COALESCE((MAX(interaction_groups3.interactions) FILTER(
	    WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at < (table initial_date)
	)), 0)
    AS interactions_this_period,
    COUNT(interaction_groups3.id) AS total_messages_conversation,
    COUNT(interaction_groups3.id) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
    ) AS messages_this_period,
    COUNT(interaction_groups3.id) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND interaction_groups3.sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS messages_this_period_by_agent,
    AVG(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,
    COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'User'
    ) AS count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period,
    AVG(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'Contact'
    ) AS avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period,
    COUNT(response_time_seconds) FILTER (
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'Contact'
    ) AS count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period,
    SUM(response_time_seconds) FILTER(
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'User'
	    AND (first_interaction_turn_this_period + 1 = interaction_groups3.interaction_turn
		OR  first_interaction_turn_this_period + 2 = interaction_groups3.interaction_turn)
    ) AS first_response_time_seconds_by_agent,
    SUM(response_time_seconds) AS sum_response_times,
    MIN(first_interaction_turn_this_period) OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS first_interaction_turn_this_period,
    COUNT(1) FILTER(
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'Contact'
	    AND id_first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_groups3.id
	    AND total_interaction_turns = first_interaction_turn_this_period
    ) AS count_missed_first_response_by_agent,
    COUNT(1) FILTER(
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'Contact'
	    AND id_first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_groups3.id
	    AND total_interaction_turns = first_interaction_turn_this_period
	    AND conversations.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
    ) AS count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation,
    COUNT(1) FILTER(
	WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at BETWEEN (table initial_date)
	    AND (table final_date)
	    AND sender_type = 'User'
	    AND id_first_interaction_turn_this_period = interaction_groups3.id
	    AND total_interaction_turns = first_interaction_turn_this_period
    ) AS count_missed_first_response_by_contact,
    bool_or(conversations.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)) OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
	AND bool_or(conversations.inbox_id not in (table sdr_inboxes)) OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS is_qualified_lead,
    conversations.contact_id,

    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(interaction_groups3))
    --     FILTER(WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at < (table initial_date))
    -- AS debug,
    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(interaction_groups3))
    --     FILTER(WHERE interaction_groups3.created_at >= (table initial_date))
    -- AS debug2,

    jsonb_agg(
	jsonb_build_object(
	    'id', interaction_groups3.id,
	    'created_at', interaction_groups3.created_at,
	    'inbox_id', conversations.inbox_id,
	    'interaction_turn', interaction_turn,
	    'interactions', interactions,
	    'interaction_interval_seconds', interaction_interval_seconds,
	    'response_time_seconds', response_time_seconds,
	    'sender_type', sender_type,
	    'content', content,
	    'id_first_interaction_turn_this_period', id_first_interaction_turn_this_period,
	    'first_interaction_turn_this_period', first_interaction_turn_this_period
	) ORDER BY interaction_groups3.created_at
  ) as conversation_messages

FROM interaction_groups3
  LEFT JOIN conversations ON conversations.id = conversation_id
GROUP BY conversation_id, conversations.created_at, conversations.inbox_id, conversations.contact_id, first_interaction_turn_this_period, total_interaction_turns
)

,conversations_info2 AS (
SELECT
  conversation_id,
  conversation_created_at,
  inbox_id,
  total_interaction_turns,
  interaction_turns_this_period,
  total_interactions,
  interactions_this_period,
  total_messages_conversation,
  messages_this_period,
  messages_this_period_by_agent,
  avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,
  count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period,
  avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period,
  count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period,
  first_response_time_seconds_by_agent,
  first_interaction_turn_this_period,
  count_missed_first_response_by_agent,
  count_missed_first_response_by_contact,
  count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation,
  is_qualified_lead,
  contact_id,

  (SELECT message_json->>'sender_type'
	FROM jsonb_array_elements(conversations_info.conversation_messages) AS message_json
	WHERE message_json->>'sender_type' is not null
	ORDER BY message_json->>'created_at' asc
	LIMIT 1)
    as first_sender,
  (SELECT message_json->>'sender_type'
	FROM jsonb_array_elements(conversations_info.conversation_messages) AS message_json
	WHERE message_json->>'sender_type' is not null
	ORDER BY message_json->>'created_at' desc
	LIMIT 1)
    as last_sender,

  sum_response_times,

  CASE WHEN is_qualified_lead
      THEN sum_response_times
      ELSE null
  END
  AS sum_response_times_qualified_leads,

  conversation_messages

FROM conversations_info
)

, conversations_agg AS (
SELECT
	SUM (count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period) AS total_count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period,
	SUM (count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period) AS total_count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period,
	SUM (count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
	AS sdr_total_count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period,
	SUM (count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
	AS sdr_total_count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period
FROM conversations_info2
)

, conversation_avg AS (
SELECT
	AVG(sum_response_times) as avg_sum_response_times,
	AVG(sum_response_times_qualified_leads)
	as avg_sum_response_times_qualified_leads,
	SUM(avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period
	    * count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period)
		/ (select total_count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period
		  from conversations_agg)
	AS avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,
	SUM(avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period
	    * count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period)
		/ (select total_count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period
		from conversations_agg)
	AS avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period,

	(SUM(avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period
	    * count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period)
	    FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)))
		/ (select sdr_total_count_interaction_responses_agent_this_period
		from conversations_agg)
	AS sdr_avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,

	(SUM(avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period
	    * count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)))
		/ (select sdr_total_count_interaction_responses_contacts_this_period
		from conversations_agg)
	AS sdr_avg_response_time_seconds_contacts_this_period,

	AVG(first_response_time_seconds_by_agent)
	AS avg_first_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,
	AVG(first_response_time_seconds_by_agent)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
	AS sdr_avg_first_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period,
        AVG(interactions_this_period)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
	as sdr_avg_interactions_this_period,
	AVG(interactions_this_period)
		FILTER (WHERE inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes) and is_qualified_lead)
	as sdr_avg_interactions_this_period_by_qualified_lead

FROM conversations_info2
)

,inboxes_info AS(
SELECT
    inbox_id,
    inboxes.name as inbox_name,
    count(conversation_id)
	FILTER (WHERE first_interaction_turn_this_period is not null)
    AS total_active_conversations,
    count(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE
          conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
	      BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date))
    AS new_conversations,
    count(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE
          conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
	      BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date)
	  AND first_interaction_turn_this_period is not null)
    AS not_empty_new_conversations,
    count(conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE
          conversations_info2.conversation_created_at
	      BETWEEN (table initial_date) AND (table final_date)
	  AND first_interaction_turn_this_period is null)
    AS empty_new_conversations,
    sum(total_interaction_turns) AS total_interaction_turns,

    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(conversations_info2))
    --   FILTER (WHERE is_qualified_lead)
    -- AS debug,
    sum(total_interactions) AS total_interactions,
    sum(interaction_turns_this_period) AS interaction_turns_this_period,
    sum(interactions_this_period) AS interactions_this_period,
    sum(messages_this_period) AS messages_this_period,
    sum(messages_this_period_by_agent) AS messages_this_period_by_agent,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.last_sender = 'User'
	      AND first_interaction_turn_this_period is not null)
    AS count_last_message_was_agent,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.last_sender = 'Contact'
		AND first_interaction_turn_this_period is not null)
    AS count_last_message_was_contact,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 1)
    AS count_at_least_one_full_interaction,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period > 1)
    AS count_more_than_one_full_interaction,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 3)
    AS count_three_or_more_full_interaction,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 5)
    AS count_five_or_more_full_interaction,
    count(conversations_info2.conversation_id)
      FILTER (WHERE conversations_info2.interactions_this_period >= 10)
    AS count_ten_or_more_full_interaction,

    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent)
    as count_missed_first_response_by_agent,

    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent)
	FILTER (WHERE inbox_id NOT IN (table sdr_inboxes) AND is_qualified_lead)
    as count_missed_first_response_by_agent_non_sdr_qualified,

    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_contact)
    as count_missed_first_response_by_contact,


    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation)
    as count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation,

    CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (table sdr_inboxes)
	THEN count(is_qualified_lead) FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
	ELSE 0
    END as count_qualified_leads,

    CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (table sdr_inboxes)
	THEN AVG(interactions_this_period)
	ELSE NULL
    END as sdr_avg_interactions,

    CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (table sdr_inboxes)
	THEN AVG(interactions_this_period) FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
	ELSE NULL
    END as sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead,

    avg(sum_response_times)
    AS avg_conversation_response_times,
    avg(sum_response_times_qualified_leads)
    AS avg_conversation_response_times_qualified_leads
  -- ,jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(conversations_info2))
  --   as conversations

FROM conversations_info2 join inboxes on inboxes.id = conversations_info2.inbox_id
GROUP BY inbox_id, inboxes.name
)

,aggregates AS (
SELECT
    sum(inboxes_info.total_active_conversations) AS total_active_conversations,
    sum(inboxes_info.total_active_conversations)
	FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_active_conversations,

    sum(inboxes_info.new_conversations) AS new_conversation,
    sum(inboxes_info.new_conversations)
        FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_new_conversation,
    sum(inboxes_info.empty_new_conversations) AS empty_new_conversations,
    sum(inboxes_info.empty_new_conversations)
	FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_empty_new_conversations,
    sum(inboxes_info.not_empty_new_conversations) AS not_empty_new_conversations,
    sum(inboxes_info.not_empty_new_conversations)
	FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_not_empty_new_conversations,

    sum(total_interactions) AS total_interactions,

    sum(inboxes_info.count_last_message_was_agent) as count_last_message_was_agent,
    sum(inboxes_info.count_last_message_was_agent)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_last_message_was_agent,

    sum(inboxes_info.count_last_message_was_contact) as count_last_message_was_contact,
    sum(inboxes_info.count_last_message_was_contact)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_last_message_was_contact,

    -- jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inboxes_info))
    --     filter(WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_name LIKE '%SDR%')
    -- AS debug,

    sum(interaction_turns_this_period) AS interaction_turns_this_period,
    sum(interaction_turns_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_interaction_turns_this_period,

    sum(interactions_this_period) AS interactions_this_period,
    sum(interactions_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_interactions_this_period,

    sum(messages_this_period) AS messages_this_period,
    sum(messages_this_period)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_messages_this_period,
    sum(messages_this_period_by_agent)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    AS sdr_messages_this_period_by_agent,

    (SELECT avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period from conversation_avg) AS avg_agent_response_time_seconds,

    (SELECT sdr_avg_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period from conversation_avg) AS sdr_avg_agent_response_time_seconds,

    (SELECT avg_first_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period from conversation_avg) AS avg_first_response_time_by_agent,

    (SELECT sdr_avg_first_response_time_seconds_agent_this_period from conversation_avg) AS sdr_avg_first_response_time_by_agent,

    (SELECT avg_sum_response_times from conversation_avg)
    AS avg_sum_response_times,

    (SELECT avg_sum_response_times_qualified_leads from conversation_avg)
    AS avg_sum_response_times_qualified_leads,


    sum(count_at_least_one_full_interaction) as count_at_least_one_full_interaction,
    sum(count_at_least_one_full_interaction) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_at_least_one_full_interaction,

    sum(count_more_than_one_full_interaction) as count_more_than_one_full_interaction,
    sum(count_more_than_one_full_interaction) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_more_than_one_full_interaction,

    sum(count_three_or_more_full_interaction) as count_three_or_more_full_interaction,
    sum(count_three_or_more_full_interaction) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_three_or_more_full_interaction,

    sum(count_five_or_more_full_interaction) as count_five_or_more_full_interaction,
    sum(count_five_or_more_full_interaction) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_five_or_more_full_interaction,

    sum(count_ten_or_more_full_interaction) as count_ten_or_more_full_interaction,
    sum(count_ten_or_more_full_interaction) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_ten_or_more_full_interaction,

    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent) as count_missed_first_response_by_agent,
    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_contact) as count_missed_first_response_by_contact,
    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent_non_sdr_qualified) as count_missed_first_response_by_agent_non_sdr_qualified,
    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_missed_first_response_by_agent,
    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_contact)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_missed_first_response_by_contact,
    sum(count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation)
      FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes))
    as sdr_count_missed_first_response_by_agent_on_new_conversation,
    sum(count_qualified_leads) as count_qualified_leads,

    (SELECT sdr_avg_interactions_this_period from conversation_avg) AS sdr_avg_interactions,
    (SELECT sdr_avg_interactions_this_period_by_qualified_lead from conversation_avg) AS sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead,

   jsonb_agg(
	jsonb_build_object(
	'inbox_id', inbox_id,
	'inbox_name', inbox_name,
	'not_empty_new_conversations', not_empty_new_conversations,
	'total_interactions', total_interactions,
	'messages_this_period', messages_this_period,
	'count_qualified_leads', count_qualified_leads,
	'interaction_turns_this_period', interaction_turns_this_period,
	'interactions_this_period', interactions_this_period,
	'total_active_conversations', total_active_conversations,
	'count_last_message_was_agent', count_last_message_was_agent,
    	'sdr_avg_interactions', sdr_avg_interactions,
	'avg_conversation_response_times', avg_conversation_response_times, 
	'avg_conversation_response_times_qualified_leads',
		avg_conversation_response_times_qualified_leads,
	'sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead', sdr_avg_interactions_per_qualified_lead--,
	--'avg_first_response_time_seconds_by_agent', avg_first_response_time_seconds_by_agent
	)
    ) FILTER (WHERE inboxes_info.inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)) as sdr_inboxes_info

FROM inboxes_info
)

,this_period_interactions AS (
    SELECT
    *,
    ((interaction_turn + 1 - first_interaction_turn_this_period) / 2)::int as interaction_this_period
    FROM interaction_groups3
    WHERE interaction_turn > first_interaction_turn_this_period
)

,sdr_time_interactions AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    interaction_this_period,
    hour_of_day
FROM this_period_interactions
WHERE
  inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period, hour_of_day
)

,sdr_time_interactions2 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    interaction_this_period,
    MAX(hour_of_day) AS hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period
)

,sdr_time_interactions3 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    hour_of_day,
    COUNT(hour_of_day) AS count_interactions_hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions2
GROUP BY conversation_id, hour_of_day
)

,sdr_time_interactions4 AS(
SELECT
    hour_of_day,
    SUM(count_interactions_hour_of_day) AS count_interactions_hour_of_day
FROM sdr_time_interactions3
GROUP BY hour_of_day
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions AS (
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    interaction_this_period,
    day_of_week
FROM this_period_interactions
WHERE
  inbox_id in (table sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period, day_of_week
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions2 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    interaction_this_period,
    MAX(day_of_week) AS day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions
GROUP BY conversation_id, interaction_this_period
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions3 AS(
SELECT
    conversation_id,
    day_of_week,
    COUNT(day_of_week) AS count_interactions_day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions2
GROUP BY conversation_id, day_of_week
)

,sdr_weekday_interactions4 AS(
SELECT
    day_of_week,
    SUM(count_interactions_day_of_week) AS count_interactions_day_of_week
FROM sdr_weekday_interactions3
GROUP BY day_of_week
)

,labels AS(
SELECT
    TRIM(label) AS label,
    COUNT(label) AS count
FROM active_conversations a
    INNER JOIN conversations c ON a.conversation_id = c.id
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(c.cached_label_list, ',')) AS label
WHERE c.cached_label_list IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(label) != ''
    AND c.inbox_id IN (table sdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY TRIM(label)
ORDER BY count DESC
)

SELECT
    *,
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sdr_time_interactions4))
      FROM sdr_time_interactions4)
    AS sdr_time_interactions,
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sdr_weekday_interactions4))
      FROM sdr_weekday_interactions4)
    AS sdr_weekday_interactions,
	(SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(labels))
      FROM labels)
    AS labels
FROM aggregates
;
